heading: Next Steps
body:
For a hands-on experience you can create an Online Archive for a collection on your
cluster through your Atlas console and API (Application Programming Interface). Once created, you can:

- [Online Archive](config-online-archive)

- [View the list of Online Archives](view-online-archive).

- Configure the connection method, standard or private endpoint,
  for your Online Archive

- [Edit an archiving rule](edit-online-archive).

- [Delete an Online Archive](delete-online-archive).

- Pause archiving.

- Restore archived data.
